behavior.idef0:
ctrl User out CurrentTime
in CurrentTime ctrl ClockRadioHMI out NewCurrentTime
in NewCurrentTime ctrl Clock out Timestamp
in Timestamp ctrl ClockRadioHMI out TimestampDisplay
behavior.description: Provide current time settings, maintain the current timestamp, and display the current time to the user.

function.description: The user-facing clock setting function provides the current time input.
The HMI propagates current time settings to the clock logic.
The clock maintains the internal timestamp.
The display path converts the maintained timestamp into user-visible output.
